text:
Once upon a time, in a small town nestled between mountains and a sparkling lake, there lived a young girl named Lily. Lily had the ability to see shapes where others saw only the everyday world. Every morning, she'd gaze out her window into the dewy grasses and imagine little clouds that danced across the sky. Her favorite cloud shaped itself into a tiny sheep that she'd follow around the town.

One day, while playing by the lake, she noticed something unusual. A flock of sparrows had gathered on the branch of an ancient oak. Something seemed different about them. They weren't chirping like usual. Instead, they were whispering. One brave chick piped up, saying, "Lily, there's a storm coming. We've never heard this chatter before."

Lily listened intently. They talked about winds that danced like tiny trees and mist that weaved through the valleys like sleepy fog. With their help, she learned how to find rainbows even on cloudy
